text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've just finished observing a race when...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That was a most excellent race. It offered plenty
of points to learn from, don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The first-place winner was particularly
exceptional.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
From her positioning and route selection to the
timing of her final push, everything about her
strategy was magnificent.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If I wanted to win against someone of her caliber,
what approach would be most effective, I
wonder?
choice_data_list:
You could throw them off by messing with their
pace.

Try sticking close to them to make sure they
can't run the way they want.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. That would prevent them from
conserving the strength in their legs properly.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, and if one is able to pull that off...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and I thoroughly discuss various
strategies to apply pressure on opponents during
races.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see... Better to bend than to break, as the saying
goes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Staying close to an opponent from start to finish
will greatly hinder their ability to run... That is
quite an excellent tactic, I must say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and I leisurely discuss the
intricacies of how to target a formidable
opponent during a race.
